description: Canonical role-permission matrix for MVP role gating and fixture alignment.

capabilities.access_common_home_modules: Access common authenticated modules (dashboard, my-order, shifts, news, notifications, profile, settings).
capabilities.publish_news: Create/update/archive news items from admin tools.
capabilities.route_production_reviewer_to_develop: When allowlisted, route production reviewer sessions to develop backend.

reviewer.notes: Reviewer is a runtime persona (allowlist + environment routing), not a persisted users.roles value.
